description: MCP server for GitHub API integration — repository management, file operations, and search.

findings.title: Privilege Escalation
findings.description: The server requests a GitHub personal access token with repo scope (full read/write). Most use cases only require repo:read or specific sub-scopes, creating unnecessary privilege.
findings.recommendation: Restrict OAuth/token scopes to the minimum necessary. Remove admin, :write wildcards and validate at startup that the provided token does not exceed declared scope.

findings.title: DoS Resilience — Missing Rate Limit / Timeout
findings.description: The tool does not gracefully handle GitHub API rate-limit responses (HTTP 429), which can cause agents to enter busy-retry loops.
findings.recommendation: Implement exponential back-off and surface rate-limit state to the calling agent.
